title: Oceanic Weaponry
description: This mod adds a few weapons themed around the ocean
body:
![Oceanic Weaponry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a57a54345c151cb478007f761429c19ea4c03e45.png)Welcome to Oceanic Weaponry. A mod focused around combat and general use tools made to fit the theme of the ocean. 

- Abyssal Moor: The Abyssal Moor is an anchor lookalike with the ability to hit entities into the air about 10 blocks. It is crafted with 4 Abyssal Shards and one Netherite Sword.
  
  -Trench Blade: The Trench Blade is a sword themed around trenches. The Sword will pull entities down in water, lasting about 5 seconds,and when enchanted with buoyant, will give the Buoyant effect, which forbids the player from entering water It is also crafted with 4 Abyssal Shards

- Leviathan Sword: The Leviathan Sword will pull any entity toward you, and when enchanted with buoyant, will give the Buoyant effect, which forbids the player from entering water. The crafting recipe is 2 Leviathan ingots and 1 netherite scrap
  
 - Leviathan Axe: The Leviathan Axe will push any entity up on right click, including the player, and when enchanted with Grounding, will throw the player down. The crafting recipe is 3 Leviathan ingots and 2 netherite scrap

- Tide Turner: This large sword weapon, on kill of a player, will teleport them to a custom prison dimension, which is full of water and lines the floors with the new bedrock tile blocks.
